features: Added a shared report/proof count summary used across report/proof pages
Report totals now stay consistent across Report Builder, Report Archive, Client Reports, and Proof Review
Proof Review now clearly separates proof item counts from published report counts
Proof Review KPI labels now distinguish Needs Review Proof, Approved Proof Items, Published Reports, Reports With Proof, Reports No Proof, and Total Proof Media
Report Archive KPI row now shows Published Reports, Reports With Proof, Reports No Proof, Photos Included, Videos Included, and Drafts/Scheduled
Report Builder KPI row now shows Published Reports, Reports With Proof, Reports No Proof, and proof-media clarity
Client Reports KPI row now shows Total Reports, Published Reports, Reports With Proof, Reports No Proof, and This Month
Clarifies the valid case where 8 reports are published but only 6 reports/media items include proof because no-proof reports are allowed
Preserved v3.0.71 Client Report publish sync and timestamp fix
